chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query:
* and instance_bill and productcode:sls |
select
  Project as Logstore,
  concat(cast(round(diff1 [1], 3) as varchar), '(GB)') as "Indexing Traffic",
  concat(
    cast(round(diffindexPack [1], 3) as varchar),
    '(GB)'
  ) as "Indexing Traffic After Deduction by Resource Plan",
  concat(
    cast(round(diff2 [1], 3) as varchar),
    ' (GB*day)'
  ) as "Storage Space Usage",
  concat(
    cast(round(diffStorPack [1], 3) as varchar),
    ' (GB*day)'
  ) as "Storage Space Usage After Deduction by Resource Plan",
  round(diff3 [1], 3) as "Expenses",
  concat(
    cast(round(diff3 [3] * 100 -100, 3) as varchar),
    '%'
  ) as "Compared With Last Month"
from(
    select
      project,
      compare(indexUsage, 2592000) as diff1,
      compare(storageusage, 2592000) as diff2,
      compare("Expenses", 2592000) as diff3,
      compare(indexUsagePackge, 2592000) as diffindexPack,
      compare(storageUsagePackge, 2592000) as diffStorPack
    from(
        select
          project,
          sum("Expenses") as "Expenses",
          sum(indexUsage) as indexUsage,
          sum(indexUsagePackge) as indexUsagePackge,
          max_by(storageUsage, __time__) as storageUsage,
          max_by(storageUsagePackge, __time__) as storageUsagePackge
        from(
            select
              array_join(slice(split(InstanceId, ';'), 2, 2), ',') as project,
              sum(PretaxAmount) as "Expenses",
              sum(
                case
                  when BillingItem like '%索引流量%' or BillingItem like '%Index%' then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage / 1024./ 1024 / 1024
                  else 0
                end
              ) as indexUsage,
              sum(
                case
                  when BillingItem like '%索引流量%' or BillingItem like '%Index%'then DeductedByResourcePackage / 1024./ 1024 / 1024
                  else 0
                end
              ) as indexUsagePackge,
              sum(
                case
                  when BillingItem like '%存储空间%' or BillingItem like '%Storage%' then Usage + DeductedByResourcePackage / 1024./ 1024 / 1024
                  else 0
                end
              ) as storageUsage,
              sum(
                case
                  when BillingItem like '%存储空间%' or BillingItem like '%Storage%' then DeductedByResourcePackage / 1024./ 1024 / 1024
                  else 0
                end
              ) as storageUsagePackge,
              __time__
            FROM              log
            group by
              project,
              __time__
          )
        group by
          project
      )
    group by
      project
  )
order by
  "Expenses" desc
limit
  1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * and instance_bill and productcode:sls | select   t,  concat(cast("Usage" as varchar),"Unit") as "Usage",concat(cast("Usage Deduction by Resource Plan" as varchar),"Unit") as "Usage Deduction by Resource Plan" , "Expenses" from(select date_format(__time__,'%b %e, %Y') as t,   arbitrary(UsageUnit)"Unit",round(sum(Usage+DeductedByResourcePackage/1024/1024/1024),3) as "Usage",  round(sum(DeductedByResourcePackage/1024/1024/1024),3) as "Usage Deduction by Resource Plan", round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "Expenses" from log where (BillingItem like '%读写流量%' or BillingItem like '%Read Write Flow%'  or BillingItem like '%Read/write Traffic%')  group by  t   order by  t    )limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * and instance_bill and productcode:sls | select   t,  concat(cast("Usage" as varchar),"Unit") as "Usage",concat(cast("Usage Deduction by Resource Plan" as varchar),"Unit") as "Usage Deduction by Resource Plan" , "Expenses" from(select date_format(__time__,'%b %e, %Y') as t,   arbitrary(UsageUnit)"Unit",round(sum(Usage+DeductedByResourcePackage/1024/1024/1024),3) as "Usage",  round(sum(DeductedByResourcePackage/1024/1024/1024),3) as "Usage Deduction by Resource Plan", round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "Expenses" from log where (BillingItem like '%读写流量%' or BillingItem like '%Read Write Flow%'  or BillingItem like '%Read/write Traffic%')  group by  t   order by  t    )limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * and instance_bill and productcode:sls |select round(max_by(usage,t),3) as "Usage" from( select  sum(Usage*1024*1024*1024+DeductedByResourcePackage) as usage ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from log where (BillingItem like '%存储空间%' or BillingItem like '%Storage%') group by t )
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * and instance_bill and productcode:sls |select round(max_by(usage,t),3) as "Usage" from( select  sum(Usage*1024*1024*1024+DeductedByResourcePackage) as usage ,date_trunc('day',__time__) as t  from log where (BillingItem like '%存储空间%' or BillingItem like '%Storage%') group by t )

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * and instance_bill and productcode:sls | select date_format(__time__,'%b %e, %Y')  as "Date",   round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "Expenses" from log group by "Date" order by "Date"   limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * and instance_bill and productcode:sls | select date_format(__time__,'%b %e, %Y')  as "Date",   round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "Expenses" from log group by "Date" order by "Date"   limit 1000

chartQueries.tokenQuery: * and instance_bill and productcode:sls | select   t,  concat(cast("Usage" as varchar),"Unit") as "Usage" , "Expenses" from(select date_format(__time__,'%b %e, %Y') as t,   arbitrary(UsageUnit)"Unit",round(sum(Usage),3) as "Usage",  round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "Expenses" from log where  (BillingItem like '%shard%' or BillingItem like '%Shard%')  group by  t   order by  t    )limit 1000

chartQueries.name: A
chartQueries.query: * and instance_bill and productcode:sls | select t, concat(cast("Usage" as varchar),'One million times') as "Usage",concat(cast("Usage Deduction by Resource Plan" as varchar),"Unit") as "Usage Deduction by Resource Plan" , "Expenses" from(select date_format(__time__,'%b %e, %Y') as t, arbitrary(UsageUnit)"Unit",round(sum(Usage+DeductedByResourcePackage/1024/1024/1024),3) as "Usage", round(sum(DeductedByResourcePackage/1000/1000),3) as "Usage Deduction by Resource Plan", round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "Expenses" from log where (BillingItem like '%读写次数%' or BillingItem like '%Read Write Count%' or BillingItem like '%Reads/write Times%')  group by t order by t )limit 1000
chartQueries.tokenQuery: * and instance_bill and productcode:sls | select t, concat(cast("Usage" as varchar),'One million times') as "Usage",concat(cast("Usage Deduction by Resource Plan" as varchar),"Unit") as "Usage Deduction by Resource Plan" , "Expenses" from(select date_format(__time__,'%b %e, %Y') as t, arbitrary(UsageUnit)"Unit",round(sum(Usage+DeductedByResourcePackage/1024/1024/1024),3) as "Usage", round(sum(DeductedByResourcePackage/1000/1000),3) as "Usage Deduction by Resource Plan", round(sum(PretaxAmount),3) as "Expenses" from log where (BillingItem like '%读写次数%' or BillingItem like '%Read Write Count%' or BillingItem like '%Reads/write Times%')  group by t order by t )limit 1000
